title: brachypodium phleoides
intro: Brachypodium phleoides, also known as false bromes or false brome, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Brachypodium phleoides include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Brachypodium phleoides can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
